testsuite.name: com.maliksalimov.my_coffee_chat.OrderQueueTest
testsuite.system-out: Barista 5 Processing order: order mocha Barista 5 Sending response: Your order has been placed: order mocha Barista 6 Processing order: Please ORDER cappuccino Barista 6 Sending response: Your order has been placed: Please ORDER cappuccino Barista 7 Processing order: order latte Barista 7 Sending response: Your order has been placed: order latte Barista 8 Processing order: I want to drink coffee Barista 8 Sending response: I don't understand your order: I want to drink coffee Barista 9 Processing order: I want to order espresso Barista 9 Sending response: Your order has been placed: I want to order espresso
